PROMPT: I'm preparing a literature summary on transformer-based models for natural language processing. Search arXiv for papers on 'transformer natural language processing' (get 50 results), find the paper with the earliest submission date among those results, download that paper, then read its full content and count how many times the word 'attention' appears in the paper. Save a summary to /data/transformer_summary.txt containing: the paper's arXiv ID, its title, its submission date, and the count of 'attention' occurrences.
GTFA_CLAIMS: [{"step": 1, "description": "Search arXiv for 'transformer natural language processing' with max_results=50, producing a large noisy list of papers with many fields per paper", "required_tool": "arxiv_search_papers", "output_characteristics": "50 papers each with id, title, authors, abstract, categories, submission date, update date — agent must scan all dates to find the earliest"}, {"step": 2, "description": "Extract the arXiv ID of the paper with the earliest submission date from the 50 results — this is the signal buried in noise", "required_tool": null, "extraction_criteria": "Sort or scan all 50 papers by submission/published date, identify the minimum date, extract that paper's arXiv ID", "signal_to_remember": "arXiv ID of earliest-dated paper"}, {"step": 3, "description": "Download the earliest paper using its arXiv ID remembered from step 2", "required_tool": "arxiv_download_paper", "dependency_on_step": 2}, {"step": 4, "description": "Read the full paper content, producing a large noisy markdown document with many sections", "required_tool": "arxiv_read_paper", "dependency_on_step": 3, "output_characteristics": "Full paper text, potentially thousands of lines with equations, references, figures captions — must count specific word"}, {"step": 5, "description": "Count occurrences of 'attention' in the paper text, then write summary file using the paper ID (from step 2), title, submission date, and count", "required_tool": "filesystem_write_file", "dependency_on_step": [2, 4], "uses_signal": "arXiv ID and submission date from step 2, attention count from step 4"}]
EVALUATION_RULES: {"required_tools": ["arxiv_search_papers", "arxiv_download_paper", "arxiv_read_paper", "filesystem_write_file"], "forbidden_tools": [], "minimum_tool_calls": 4, "signal_extraction_step": 1, "signal_usage_step": 3, "noise_characteristics": "50 search results with titles, abstracts, authors, categories, dates — agent must find the single paper with the earliest date among many results, then process full paper text to count a specific word"}
STATE_ASSERTIONS: [{"description": "Output file /data/transformer_summary.txt was created", "code": "os.path.exists('/data/transformer_summary.txt')", "expected": true}, {"description": "Summary file is non-empty (> 50 bytes)", "code": "os.path.getsize('/data/transformer_summary.txt') > 50", "expected": true}, {"description": "Summary file contains an arXiv paper ID pattern", "code": "re.search(r'\\d{4}\\.\\d{4,5}', open('/data/transformer_summary.txt').read()) is not None", "expected": true}, {"description": "Summary file contains the word 'attention' count (a number)", "code": "re.search(r'attention.*\\d+|\\d+.*attention', open('/data/transformer_summary.txt').read(), re.IGNORECASE) is not None", "expected": true}, {"description": "Summary file contains a date or year reference", "code": "re.search(r'(19|20)\\d{2}', open('/data/transformer_summary.txt').read()) is not None", "expected": true}]
